questions.question: Why does a raw pre-trained language model often respond to 'write a Python function that reverses a list' with another prompt instead of code?
questions.question_zh: 原始的预训练语言模型在收到「写一个反转列表的 Python 函数」时，为什么经常回的是另一个 prompt 而不是代码？
options: Its vocabulary lacks Python tokens
It cannot represent function signatures without fine-tuning
Its temperature defaults to zero
It is trained to complete web-style text, where prompts continue with more prompts
options_zh: 它的词表里没有 Python 相关 token
不 fine-tune 就无法表达函数签名
它的 temperature 默认是 0
它被训练去补全网页式文本，而 prompt 之后接的往往是更多 prompt

questions.question: Which loss does the InstructGPT reward model use over pairwise preference labels?
questions.question_zh: InstructGPT 的 reward model 在成对偏好标注上用的是哪种 loss？
options: Mean squared error on labeler scores
Bradley-Terry: -log sigmoid(r(x, y_w) - r(x, y_l))
Hinge loss with a fixed margin
Cross-entropy between predicted and true reward
options_zh: 对标注员分数取均方误差
Bradley-Terry：-log sigmoid(r(x, y_w) - r(x, y_l))
固定 margin 的 hinge loss
预测 reward 和真实 reward 之间的交叉熵

questions.question: What is the KL penalty in stage 3 of InstructGPT primarily protecting against?
questions.question_zh: InstructGPT 第三阶段中的 KL 惩罚主要在防止什么？
options: Catastrophic forgetting of tokenizer statistics
Numerical instability in PPO gradient updates
Overflowing context windows during sampling
The optimizer finding adversarial high-reward strings that exploit the reward model
options_zh: 对 tokenizer 统计的灾难性遗忘
PPO 梯度更新中的数值不稳定
采样时 context window 溢出
优化器找到能利用 reward model 漏洞的对抗性高分字符串

questions.question: What problem does PPO-ptx mix into the RL objective to mitigate?
questions.question_zh: PPO-ptx 在 RL 目标里混入额外项是为了缓解什么问题？
options: The reward model drifting during PPO
The KL term becoming negative
The alignment tax: regression on benchmarks RLHF did not target
Tokenizer mismatch between SFT and RM
options_zh: PPO 过程中 reward model 漂移
KL 项变为负值
对齐税（alignment tax）：在 RLHF 没有针对的 benchmark 上出现回退
SFT 和 RM 之间的 tokenizer 不一致

questions.question: A 1.3B InstructGPT was preferred over the 175B base GPT-3 about 70% of the time. What does this say about alignment and capability?
questions.question_zh: 1.3B 的 InstructGPT 在大约 70% 的情况下被偏好于 175B 的基础 GPT-3。这对 alignment 和 capability 说明了什么？
options: Alignment is a different axis from capability, and the base model sets the capability floor
Preference rates above 50% prove the proxy reward equals human values
Capability and alignment are the same axis at scale
Bigger base models always lose to small aligned models
options_zh: Alignment 和 capability 是两个不同的维度，基础模型设定了能力下限
偏好率超过 50% 就证明代理 reward 等同于人类价值观
在规模上 capability 和 alignment 就是同一个维度
更大的基础模型总会输给小的对齐模型

questions.question: Which of the following is the reward model in InstructGPT initialized from?
questions.question_zh: InstructGPT 中的 reward model 是从下列哪个起点初始化的？
options: A random scalar regressor with no pretraining
A separate encoder-only transformer
The base pre-trained model with the LM head intact
The SFT model with the LM head replaced by a scalar head
options_zh: 一个完全随机、未预训练的标量回归器
一个单独的 encoder-only transformer
保留 LM head 的基础预训练模型
把 LM head 换成标量 head 的 SFT 模型
